name: Clara Pipeline B — Onboarding to Agent v2

nodes.name: Manual Trigger
nodes.notes: Click 'Test workflow' to run Pipeline B. Run this AFTER Pipeline A has completed for all 5 demo accounts.

nodes.name: Set Config
nodes.notes: Configure paths. outputs_path must point to where Pipeline A wrote v1 files.

nodes.name: List Onboarding Files
nodes.notes: Lists all onboarding transcript files. These must be named to match demo files (e.g. onboarding_001.txt pairs with demo_001.txt).

nodes.name: Split File List
nodes.notes: Splits the file list into individual items for per-file processing.

nodes.name: Map to Account IDs
nodes.notes: Derives the matching demo account_id from each onboarding filename. onboarding_001.txt → account_id: demo_001.

nodes.name: Check v1 Exists
nodes.notes: Verifies that Pipeline A has already created v1 for this account. If MISSING, the error path is taken.

nodes.name: v1 Found?
nodes.notes: Only proceed with onboarding if v1 exists. True = run Pipeline B. False = log that demo must run first.

nodes.name: Run Pipeline B (per file)
nodes.notes: Runs your Python patch pipeline: normalize → extract updates → apply_patch → generate v2 agent spec → write_outputs → supabase update → changelog.

nodes.name: Log v1 Missing
nodes.notes: If v1 is missing, log a warning and skip this file. The workflow continues with the next onboarding file.

nodes.name: Parse v2 Result
nodes.notes: Parses the Python output to get account_id, status, and how many fields changed (for the summary).

nodes.name: Success or Error?
nodes.notes: Routes to success logging or error logging based on Python exit code.

nodes.name: Log Success
nodes.notes: Logs the successful v2 update including how many fields were changed from v1.

nodes.name: Log Error
nodes.notes: Appends error details to errors.jsonl. Does not halt workflow — remaining files continue.

nodes.name: Batch Summary
nodes.notes: Final summary node. Shows how many accounts upgraded to v2, how many were skipped or failed.
